title: [FIRRTL] width inference (dshr) mismatch
body:
The following FIRRTL program

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp73: UInt<4>
    tmp73 <= dshr(UInt<4>("b100"), UInt("h2a2"))
```

Compiled with `firtool` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [3:0] tmp73);

  assign tmp73 = 4'h1;	// a_top_mod.fir:2:3, :4:14
endmodule
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [3:0] tmp73
);
  assign tmp73 = 4'h0;
endmodule
```

`Yosys 0.9+3911 (git sha1 4b31223e, clang 11.0.1 -fPIC -Os)` reports formal mismatch:

```
ERROR: Found 1 unproven $equiv cells in 'equiv_status -assert'.
```
